prompt: Look up two records without changing either one: the inventory record “Nitrile Exam Gloves” at Clinic Stockroom, and “Surgical Masks” at Mobile Clinic. Report each stable ID, date, and status. If the lookup does not identify one exact record, ask me to disambiguate instead of guessing.

follow_up_turns.content: Move only the first inventory record, “Nitrile Exam Gloves,” to 2026-10-19. Leave “Surgical Masks” untouched and do not send a notification.
Date correction for “Nitrile Exam Gloves” only: use 2026-11-23. The other record must remain unchanged.

stages.purpose: Run two independent record lookups in one assistant action.
Change only the first record named by the follow-up.
Apply the corrected date to that same first record.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
If the lookup does not identify one exact record, ask me to disambiguate instead of guessing.
Report both lookup results before the follow-up.
Never imply that the comparison record was updated.
The two initial searches must be issued together because neither depends on the other.
